outcome: The EVE UI is less cluttered: obsolete snapshot/config pages and duplicate controls are gone, the top header no longer exposes copy/settings actions, and dark mode renders consistently across the main shell.

added.description: Sidebar navigation keeps the top search form and removes the dedicated Snapshots, duplicate Search, and repository config entries.
Evolution detail pages keep checkout and timeline context while removing the standalone snapshot page entry point.
The top header shows only breadcrumb context without copy-link or settings actions.
The dark-mode toggle applies the dark-preview theme across hard-coded light surfaces, slate text, and selected states.

verification.reference: generated bundle string check found no removed visible labels or snapshot route
